product.one_line_description: Plaid provides APIs for accessing financial data, initiating payments, verifying identity, preventing fraud, and supporting credit underwriting processes.

authentication.auth_summary: The provided documentation does not explicitly detail the authentication methods required to access the Plaid API.

developer_access.access_notes: The documentation provides a 'Get started' link, but it does not specify whether API credentials can be obtained freely and without human approval, or if it requires a trial, paid plan, or sales/admin gating.

api_surface.api_summary: Plaid offers a broad public API with numerous functionalities, including retrieving bank account information, balances, transaction data, investment holdings, liabilities, and supporting payments, identity verification, fraud prevention, and credit underwriting. It is accessible via server-side API libraries and integrates with API endpoints, suggesting RESTful interactions and SDK support.

mcp.mcp_summary: Plaid offers an official Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server for developer tooling, available via a GitHub repository labeled as 'Plaid MCP Server'.

buildability.verdict_reasoning: Critical atomic facts regarding public API availability or credential gating remain unclear.

confidence.human_review_reason: Authentication methods and the exact developer access model (e.g., self-serve, free, trial, or gated) for obtaining API credentials are not clearly specified in the provided documentation.

evidence_pool.claim: Plaid provides APIs for accessing financial data, initiating payments, verifying identity, preventing fraud, and supporting credit underwriting processes.
evidence_pool.evidence_snippet:
#### Auth
Retrieve bank account information for ACH, wire, and other bank-to-bank transfers.
#### Balance
Retrieve real-time account balance information.
#### Identity
Verify users' financial account ownership and reduce fraud.
#### Transfer
Send and receive money end to end with Plaid.
#### Transactions
Retrieve transaction data for budgeting tools, expense management, and more.
#### Investments
View holdings and transactions from investment accounts.
#### Liabilities
Access loan data, like balances and interest rates, for student loans, mortgages, and credit cards.
#### Enrich
Add detailed information and insights to your existing transactions data.
#### Identity Verification
Global KYC compliance and anti-fraud. Verify user identity data and documents.
#### Monitor
Use with Identity Verification to enable sanction, PEP, and watchlist screening for anti-money laundering compliance.
#### Protect
Prevent fraud before it happens — at every step of the user lifecycle.
#### Consumer Report (by Plaid Check)
Make smarter credit and lending decisions with insights powered by Plaid Check.
#### Assets
Access users' financial information for loan underwriting.
#### Statements
Get PDF statements directly from the user's bank, for underwriting verification and compliance.
#### Income
Verify income and employment, for lending use cases and more.
Hi! I'm Bill! You can ask me all about the Plaid API.

# Welcome to the Docs
#### Here you'll find guides, resources, and references to build with Plaid.

#### API Reference
Explore server-side API libraries and integrate with API endpoints

#### API Reference
Explore server-side API libraries and integrate with API endpoints

#### Auth
Retrieve bank account information for ACH, wire, and other bank-to-bank transfers.
#### Balance
Retrieve real-time account balance information.
#### Identity
Verify users' financial account ownership and reduce fraud.
#### Signal Transaction Scores
Reduce fraud and provide instant funds access by assessing the return risk of an ACH debit transaction.
#### Transfer
Send and receive money end to end with Plaid.
#### Investments Move
Get verified data for initiating an ACATS or ATON brokerage-to-brokerage transfer.
#### Payments (Europe)
Make one-time payments, recurring payments, or payouts within your app.
#### Transactions
Retrieve transaction data for budgeting tools, expense management, and more.
#### Investments
View holdings and transactions from investment accounts.
#### Liabilities
Access loan data, like balances and interest rates, for student loans, mortgages, and credit cards.
#### Enrich
Add detailed information and insights to your existing transactions data.
#### Identity Verification
Global KYC compliance and anti-fraud. Verify user identity data and documents.
#### Monitor
Use with Identity Verification to enable sanction, PEP, and watchlist screening for anti-money laundering compliance.
#### Protect
Prevent fraud before it happens — at every step of the user lifecycle.
#### Consumer Report (by Plaid Check)
Make smarter credit and lending decisions with insights powered by Plaid Check.
#### Assets
Access users' financial information for loan underwriting.
#### Statements
Get PDF statements directly from the user's bank, for underwriting verification and compliance.
#### Income
Verify income and employment, for lending use cases and more.
#### Layer
Onboard users instantly with just a phone number.
Plug me in via the [Plaid MCP Server](https://github.com/plaid/ai-coding-toolkit/tree/main/sandbox).
